title: Atlas Expansion II: Domains 436-465 (Analysis & Geometry)

D436.name: Functional analysis: Banach spaces
D436.reason: Norms ‖f‖: real measurement; bounded operators = EML-2

D437.name: Spectral theory of bounded operators
D437.reason: Spectrum σ(T) ⊂ R or C; eigenvalues = EML-2 (real) or EML-3 (complex)

D438.name: Operator algebras (C*-algebras)
D438.reason: GNS representation; complex Hilbert space = EML-3

D442.name: Index theory (Atiyah-Singer)
D442.reason: Index = dim ker - dim coker; K-theory + elliptic ops = EML-3

D443.name: Elliptic partial differential equations
D443.reason: Sobolev spaces; energy estimates = EML-2 real

D444.name: Parabolic PDEs (heat equation)
D444.reason: u_t = Δu: exp(-λt) solutions; EML-1 decay

D446.name: Schrödinger equation
D446.reason: ψ_t = iHψ: complex oscillatory; quantum = EML-3

D449.name: Stochastic PDEs (SPDE)
D449.reason: White noise forcing; non-constructive solutions = EML-∞

D451.name: Riemannian geometry
D451.reason: Curvature tensor components: real measurements = EML-2

D452.name: Complex geometry (Kähler manifolds)
D452.reason: Kähler form ω: complex structure = EML-3

D454.name: Contact geometry
D454.reason: Contact form α: real differential = EML-2

D457.name: Minimal surfaces
D457.reason: Mean curvature H=0: real condition = EML-2

D459.name: Mirror symmetry (SYZ conjecture)
D459.reason: Calabi-Yau mirror pair: complex oscillatory = EML-3

D460.name: Gromov-Witten invariants
D460.reason: Virtual fundamental class; quantum cohomology = EML-3

D461.name: Donaldson theory (4-manifolds)
D461.reason: Yang-Mills instantons: complex gauge theory = EML-3

D463.name: Floer homology
D463.reason: Pseudo-holomorphic strips; Morse theory on loop space = EML-3

D464.name: Perelman's Ricci flow
D464.reason: ∂g/∂t = -2Ric: real tensor PDE; entropy functional = EML-2

D465.name: Geometric Langlands program
D465.reason: D-modules ↔ local systems; complex algebraic = EML-3

EML_3: D438-D442 operator algebras + NC geom + index
summary.new_theorem: T141: Atlas Batch 2 (S421): 30 new domains; analysis/geometry classified

verdicts.pde: PDE depth ladder: heat(EML-1) < elliptic(EML-2) < wave/Schrödinger(EML-3) < NS(EML-∞)
verdicts.geometry: Real geometry (Riemannian, contact, sub-Riem): EML-2; complex geometry: EML-3
verdicts.operator_algebras: C*, von Neumann, free probability, NC geometry: all EML-3

key_theorem: Atlas Batch 2 (T141, S421): 30 new domains. PDE depth ladder: heat(EML-1) < elliptic(EML-2) < wave/Schrödinger/Dirac(EML-3) < NS(EML-∞). Geometry: real (Riemannian, contact) = EML-2; complex (Kähler, symplectic, mirror) = EML-3. Operator algebras + NC geometry + index theory: all EML-3. Navier-Stokes and SPDE: EML-∞ (non-constructive regularity). 0 violations. Total domains: 475.
rabbit_hole_log: PDE ladder: heat EML-1, elliptic EML-2, wave EML-3, NS EML-∞
